channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 flights as Iran war causes jet fuel shortage
item.description: The German airline says 20,000 short-haul flights would be removed from its ⁠schedule between now and October.

item.title: What we know about Israel killing Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil
item.description: Khalil was killed and her colleague injured in what Lebanese officials are calling a 'double-tap' strike by Israel.

item.title: Who is John Phelan, the US Navy Secretary fired by Pete Hegseth?
item.description: Phelan's firing reveals turbulence in US military leadership amid the ongoing US-Israeli war with Iran.

item.title: India to Iran: How two wars shaped the rise of Pakistan’s Asim Munir
item.description: The war against India a year ago led to Munir's elevation to the status of field marshal. Now he's playing peacemaker.

item.title: Israeli strike kills five in Gaza, including three children
item.description: Israel has committed 2,400 violations of the 'ceasefire' deal struck with Hamas in October, Gaza officials say.

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 55 after Trump extended ceasefire?
item.description: Iran says it wants talks, but blames US “breach of commitments, blockade and threats” for stalling negotiations.

item.title: Protesters stabbed at London rally against war on Iran
item.description: Videos show multiple individuals with what appear to be knife wounds, who were taking part in a protest in London.

item.title: Israel kills journalist and wounds another in south Lebanon targeted attack
item.description: Israel has killed journalist Amal Khalil and injured Zeinab Faraj in a ‘double-tap’ attack in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Iran releases video of IRGC seizing ship in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran’s revolutionary guard has released a video said to show its forces seizing a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran war live: Israel kills Lebanese journalist; Tehran-US talks stalled
item.description: Israeli attacks on Lebanon killed at least five people on Wednesday, including Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil.
